title: The Sixth Sense
description: Provides clean and simple visual alerts for incoming threats.
body:
**The Sixth Sense**

The Sixth Sense is a minimalist warning mod that alerts you to dangers approaching from behind or outside your field of view without cluttering the vanilla UI. The icons only appear at the bottom of your screen when there is immediate danger.

_Skeleton Warning_: Appears when a skeleton is aiming at you nearby. The icon fills up based on the bow's draw speed, allowing you to anticipate exactly when the arrow will be fired.

<details>
<summary>Skeleton</summary>

![Skeleton Alert](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffa78e4001512480ca0c1f61a4b59dda95efc55f.gif)!

</details>



_Creeper Warning_: Appears on screen if a Creeper is silently sneaking up behind you and is about to explode. The warning icon becomes more intense as the explosion moment approaches.

<details>
<summary>Creeper</summary>

![Creeper Alert](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9dedb8273855621fb4c346bab9d7bd341f5fb700.gif)

</details>


_Shulker Warning_: Detects incoming Shulker bullets flying towards you. A small counter next to the icon allows you to track exactly how many bullets are chasing you.

<details>
<summary>Shulker</summary>

![Shulker Alert](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45c60899e2b2b779de3e0a3298f9da743b3726e0.gif)

</details>



_Warden Warning & Compass_: Displays a beating heart on your screen when a Warden is nearby. As the Warden gets closer, the heartbeat speeds up and starts shaking. A small arrow orbiting the heart acts as a compass, pointing in the direction the Warden is hiding or approaching from.

<details>
<summary>Warden</summary>

![Warden Alert](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c105483354779006d113f60ac9ee61bcad5a816.gif)

</details>



_Ghast Warning_: Appears when a Ghast is preparing to shoot or a fireball is flying towards you. The warning features a smooth, spinning fireball animation and displays the exact distance of the threat in meters. If you dodge the fireball and it flies past you, the alert instantly disappears.

<details>
<summary>Ghast</summary>

![Ghast Alert](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8c355a823f51c4ee734f922bd1bc799d2899a40.gif)

</details>


_Quick Toggle_: You can completely enable or disable the mod's HUD at any time with a single keybind (Default: Numpad 0).

_Optional Customization_: Through the mod's config file, you can disable any warnings you don't want or enable an optional feature that shows the Warden's exact distance from you in meters.
